criteria.reason: Run input can use lead_ids and produce a hydrated lead_shortlist artifact.
Shortlist approval includes artifact payload and applies the existing outreach status transition.
Blueprint creates LocalOS message drafts from approved shortlist leads without provider writes.
Draft approval approves generated drafts and send capability receives those draft_ids.
Live smoke verified queue-only behavior with dispatcher disabled.
Targeted tests, lint, deploy, live smoke, and server health checks passed.
source_leads now hydrates a lead_source_plan artifact from prospectingleads and smoke/lint guardrails verify it.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py tests/test_operator_paid_action_adapter.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py
git archive --format=tar HEAD src scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh docker-compose.yml | ssh ...
cat scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py | ssh ... docker compose exec -T app ...
ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && docker compose logs --since 10m app ...'
